error.password_too_long: The Secure Controls mobile app only accepts passwords up to 12 characters.

user.title: Secure Controls account
user.description: Enter the username (email address) and password that you use with the Secure Controls mobile app.

init.title: SecureMTR statistics options
init.description: Configure the runtime statistics defaults used for SecureMTR.

data_description.primary_anchor: Base time used to align the primary zone statistics window.
data_description.boost_anchor: Base time used to align the boost zone statistics window.
data_description.element_power_kw: Power rating used when deriving energy consumption from runtime.
data_description.prefer_device_energy: Use SecureMTR provided energy totals instead of derived values when available.

reset_energy_accumulator.name: Reset energy accumulator
reset_energy_accumulator.description: Reset the cumulative energy statistics for a SecureMTR config entry zone.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: Config entry ID of the SecureMTR controller to reset.

zone.name: Zone
zone.description: SecureMTR zone to reset. Defaults to the primary zone.
